name: test_vaccination_file_upload_creates_child_no_setting
description:
Test: Upload a vaccination file with no URN/care setting and verify the child
record is created and the location is set to school (MAV-855).
Steps:
1. Upload a vaccination file missing care setting for a child not in Mavis.
2. Navigate to children page and search for the child.
3. Open vaccination details for the child.
Verification:
- Vaccination location is displayed as the school.
Scenarios covered: MAV-855
descriptionHtml:
Test: Upload a vaccination file with no URN/care setting and verify the child
record is created and the location is set to school (MAV-855).
Steps:

  1. Upload a vaccination file missing care setting for a child not in Mavis.
  2. Navigate to children page and search for the child.
  3. Open vaccination details for the child.
    Verification:
  • Vaccination location is displayed as the school.
    Scenarios covered: MAV-855

steps.name: Log in as User(username='annafox@example.net', password='annafox@example.net', role='nurse') and choose team Team(name='Walker-Parry est. 1982', workgroup='M371L', careplus_venue_code='M371L', email='zperry@example.net', phone='+44(0)7700 900467')
Log in as {1} and choose team {2}
Log in as User(username='annafox@example.net', password='annafox@example.net', role='nurse')

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (User(username='annafox@example.net', password='annafox@example.net', role='nurse'), Team(name='Walker-Parry est. 1982', workgroup='M371L', careplus_venue_code='M371L', email='zperry@example.net', phone='+44(0)7700 900467'))

Click on Manage vaccinations in schools

testStage.description:
Test: Upload a vaccination file with no URN/care setting and verify the child
record is created and the location is set to school (MAV-855).
Steps:
1. Upload a vaccination file missing care setting for a child not in Mavis.
2. Navigate to children page and search for the child.
3. Open vaccination details for the child.
Verification:
- Vaccination location is displayed as the school.
Scenarios covered: MAV-855

steps.name: Click on Manage vaccinations in schools
Click on Manage vaccinations in schools
Check Children aged out of programmes
Check Children aged out of programmes
Click on School(name='The Sallygate School', urn='137795', site=None) vaccination details

Actual value:

  Uploaded byNURSE, NurseFileVaccsFileMapping.INVALID_STRUCTURE20260105100811.csvTypeVaccination recordsStatusInvalid
Records1
      
    


          
      
                Records could not be imported





        

      
    
      The records cannot be uploaded due to errors in the CSV file.

    

    How to format your Mavis CSV file for vaccination records
  Make sure the CSV you upload uses the following columns:

  Column nameNotesORGANISATION_CODEOptional, must be a valid ODS code.SCHOOL_URNOptional, must be 6 digits and numeric. Use 888888 for school unknown and 999999 for homeschooled.SCHOOL_NAMERequired if SCHOOL_URN is 888888.NHS_NUMBEROptional, must be 10 digits and numeric.PERSON_FORENAMERequiredPERSON_SURNAMERequiredPERSON_DOBRequired, must use either YYYYMMDD or DD/MM/YYYY format.PERSON_GENDER_CODERequired, must be Not known, Male, Female, Not specified.PERSON_POSTCODERequired, must be formatted as a valid postcode.DATE_OF_VACCINATIONRequired, must use either YYYYMMDD or DD/MM/YYYY format.TIME_OF_VACCINATIONOptional, must use HH:MM:SS format.VACCINATEDRequired, must be Y or N. Can be omitted if VACCINE_GIVEN is provided.VACCINE_GIVENOptional, must be Sequirus Cell-based Trivalent, AstraZeneca Fluenz, Sanofi Vaxigrip, Viatris, Cervarix, Gardasil, Gardasil9, MenQuadfi, Menveo, Nimenrix, Priorix, VaxPro, ProQuad, Priorix-Tetra, or Revaxis.BATCH_NUMBERRequired if BATCH_EXPIRY_DATE is provided.BATCH_EXPIRY_DATERequired if BATCH_NUMBER is provided, must use either YYYYMMDD or DD/MM/YYYY format.PROGRAMMERequired, must be Flu, HPV, ACWYX4, MenACWY, MMR, MMRV, 3-in-1, or Td/IPV.ANATOMICAL_SITEOptional, if provided must be appropriate for the vaccine delivery method and be one of: left arm (lower position), left arm (upper position), left buttock, left deltoid, left thigh, left upper arm, nasal, right arm (lower position), right arm (upper position), right buttock, right deltoid, right thigh or right upper arm.REASON_NOT_VACCINATEDRequired if VACCINATED is N, must be already had elsewhere, refused, unwell or vaccination contraindicated.NOTESOptionalDOSE_SEQUENCEOptional, must be a number or 1B, 1P, 1st Scheduled Booster, 2B, 2P, 2nd Scheduled Booster or 3P.CARE_SETTINGOptional, must be 1 (school) or 2 (clinic).CLINIC_NAMERequired if CARE_SETTING is 2, must be the name of a community clinic location.PERFORMING_PROFESSIONAL_EMAILRequired if uploading offline vaccination records.PERFORMING_PROFESSIONAL_FORENAMEOptionalPERFORMING_PROFESSIONAL_SURNAMEOptional



        
            
                Row 2
            

            
                  VACCINATED is required
                  DATE_OF_VACCINATION or Event date is required
                  PERSON_DOB or Date of birth is required
                  PERSON_FORENAME or First name is required
                  PERSON_GENDER_CODE, PERSON_GENDER or Sex is required
                  PERSON_SURNAME or Surname is required
                  PERSON_POSTCODE or Postcode is required
                  PROGRAMME or Vaccination type is required
                  REASON_NOT_VACCINATED is required
